text.title: django-api Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the endpoint map cleanly to standard CRUD on a single model?

branch.conclusion: kind="model-viewset" (DRF) or "ninja-router-crud" (Ninja). Use a Router with default URLs. Set input/output serializer pair via get_serializer_class.

branch.question: Is the endpoint an action verb (activate, archive, retry) or aggregates multiple models?

branch.conclusion: kind="apiview" (DRF) or "ninja-router-action" (Ninja). Thin handler: parse → service → return. No ViewSet, no router auto-URL.

branch.question: Can the list grow unbounded (timeline-style data, audit log)?

branch.conclusion: pagination="cursor", ordered by (-created_at, -id). Page-number on unbounded lists triggers OFFSET scans and breaks under churn.
pagination="page-number" with explicit page_size cap. Acceptable for static counts < ~10k.

text.example: endpoint=Invoice list, single-model CRUD, ~100k/customer unbounded q-shape -> true => conclusion r2-thin-views: kind=model-viewset, pagination=cursor.
